name: Kore.ai Conversational AI Platform API
what_it_does: Enterprise conversational AI platform with REST API — building virtual assistants and process automation bots for enterprises, with XO Platform for multi-engine NLP, universal bot architecture, omnichannel deployment (voice, chat, email), employee virtual assistant use cases, and enterprise system integrations for HR, IT, finance, and customer service.
use_cases: Building enterprise virtual assistants for HR and IT helpdesk automation via Kore.ai XO Platform
Deploying conversational AI across voice and chat channels for customer service automation
Integrating Kore.ai bots with enterprise systems (SAP, Workday, ServiceNow) via API
Querying bot analytics and conversation metrics for AI performance monitoring
Managing virtual assistant intents, entities, and dialog flows via REST API
not_for: Simple website chatbots (use Drift or Intercom for marketing site chat)
E-commerce-specific automation (use Zowie for e-commerce support bots)
SMBs without enterprise IT/HR systems (Kore.ai serves enterprise with complex integrations)
best_when: A large enterprise needs virtual assistants for both employee-facing (HR, IT helpdesk) and customer-facing use cases, with deep integrations into SAP, Workday, ServiceNow, and other enterprise systems.
avoid_when: You're an SMB, need simple chatbots without enterprise system integration, or lack dedicated conversational AI development resources.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials and authorization code flows. JWT for bot authentication. Bearer token auth. Bot-scoped access. Webhook for conversation events and system alerts. Enterprise SSO via SAML and OIDC. API scoped by bot, environment (dev/prod), and resource type. SDK available for Node.js, Python, Java.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free Community Edition: limited usage for development
pricing.notes: Orlando, FL company (HQ). Founded 2014. Raised $221M+ (Series D, 2023). Backed by Tiger Global, Nvidia, PNC, Standard Chartered. India engineering roots (Hyderabad). XO Platform is the multi-engine NLP platform supporting 100+ languages. Universal Bot architecture for multi-bot orchestration. BFSI (banking, financial services, insurance) and healthcare verticals. 200+ enterprise customers including Coca-Cola, UnitedHealth. Gartner Magic Quadrant leader.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits per deployment; community edition limited

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for bots, intents, sessions, analytics, and system integrations. OAuth2 and JWT auth. Good developer documentation. XO Platform concept (multi-engine NLP) requires learning Kore.ai data model. Universal Bot for orchestrating multiple bots — adds complexity. SDK for Node.js, Python, Java available.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Analytics reads idempotent. Intent reads idempotent. Bot configuration updates use versioning — use version ID for idempotent updates.
known_agent_gotchas: XO Platform multi-engine NLP requires understanding of Kore.ai-specific concepts
Universal Bot orchestration adds configuration complexity for multi-bot scenarios
Enterprise system integrations (SAP, Workday) require separate connector configuration
FedRAMP authorization for US government use — additional compliance setup required
100+ language support — NLP quality varies significantly by language

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR, FedRAMP compliant. Multi-region data residency. OAuth2 and JWT auth. FedRAMP authorization for US government customers. Enterprise system integrations access sensitive HR/finance data — implement least-privilege API access. HIPAA BAA available for healthcare deployments.
